extra.reason: Implemented pj census JSON and live stdlib dashboard server with signature-aware refresh; tests pass.
Implemented search sort modes, project scoping, multi-term matching, regex search, and fixed filesystem search limiting so newer matches are not crowded out by root order.
Added pj --version and bumped the pre-1.0 feature release version to 0.2.0.
Made pj search help teach project scoping, multi-term search, regex, sort modes, and phrase-search pitfalls; added no-result hint for quoted multi-word searches.
Added pj search --here to infer the current project from cwd using longest discovered project path containment; documented and tested success/error behavior.
Changed Codex resume command formatting from codex --resume <id> to codex resume <id>, updated CLI/help docs, and covered with tests.
Implemented census background start/status/stop CLI lifecycle with structured JSON output, local health/control endpoint, process metadata, docs, and tests.
Fixed pj search/session timestamps to use session last activity (ended_at) when available; added regression tests and verified the original search now reports recent activity.
Implemented regex discoverability hints and tests
Bumped pj version to 0.2.1 and verified CLI version command
Implemented pj chats and pj chat list alias with cwd project resolution, docs, and tests.
Bumped package and CLI version to 0.2.2 and verified with tests.

Done: documented and tested CLI-first web API contract; added thin stdlib endpoints for census/search/show/chats/chat/annotations with annotation writes through pj.annotate and shared project session helper. Validation: python3 -m pytest (178 passed).
